noAccess.title: No access
noAccess.description: You do not have permission to view the Secret Manager. Contact an administrator to request access.

session.lockHint: Lock the Secret Manager session and clear the in-memory key
session.unlockHint: Click to unlock the Secret Manager

unlock.title: Unlock Secret Manager
unlock.description: Enter your password to unlock this session.
unlock.lostBoth: I lost both my password and recovery key
unlock.loadError: Failed to load your keypair. Please refresh the page and try again.
unlock.alreadySetUpNote: Your Secret Manager is already set up. The recovery key is shown only once, during setup, and is not displayed here. If you've forgotten your password, use the option below to reset it with your recovery key.

changePassword.title: Change your password
changePassword.description: Enter your current password and choose a new one. Your recovery key is unaffected and keeps working.
changePassword.currentFailed: Incorrect current password. Please try again.
changePassword.newHint: At least 8 characters. Choose something strong and memorable.
changePassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
changePassword.noKeypair: You have not set up your Secret Manager yet.
changePassword.error: Failed to change your password. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.description: Enter your recovery key and choose a new password. You'll be signed in automatically once it's reset.
resetPassword.recoveryFailed: Incorrect recovery key. Please check the format and try again.
resetPassword.newHint: At least 8 characters. Choose something strong and memorable.
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.noKeypair: You have not set up your Secret Manager yet.
resetPassword.error: Failed to reset your password. Please try again.

bootstrap.title: Set up your Secret Manager
bootstrap.description: Create a password to secure your personal encryption key. This password cannot be recovered by anyone, including administrators.
bootstrap.passphraseHint: At least 8 characters. Choose something strong and memorable.
bootstrap.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
bootstrap.warning: Your password is never sent to the server. If you lose it and your recovery key, your vault data will be permanently inaccessible.
bootstrap.error: Failed to create keypair. Please try again.
bootstrap.createdDescription: Your keypair was created and your recovery key saved, but the session could not be unlocked automatically. Enter your password below to unlock — your keypair is safe and was not lost.
bootstrap.unlockFailed: Could not unlock with that password. Make sure it matches the one you just set.

reset.title: Reset your identity
reset.description: Set a new password. This creates a brand-new encryption keypair — you will lose access to all vaults until a vault admin re-grants each one.
reset.regrantWarning: Warning: after reset, you will not be able to read any vault until a current member re-grants you access. Coordinate with your team before proceeding.
reset.error: Failed to reset keypair. Please try again.
reset.createdDescription: Your new keypair was created and your recovery key saved, but the session could not be unlocked automatically. Enter your new password below to unlock — your keypair is safe and was not lost.
reset.unlockFailed: Could not unlock with that password. Make sure it matches the new one you just set.

recoveryKey.title: Save your recovery key
recoveryKey.description: This is the only backup for your vault access. It is shown exactly once and cannot be retrieved again — save it somewhere safe before continuing.
recoveryKey.copyFailed: Copy is unavailable here (your connection is not secure). Select the key above and copy it manually before continuing — this is your only copy.
recoveryKey.warning: Store this key outside the system — a password manager, a printed copy in a secure location. This recovery key is the only way to reset your password if you forget it; if you lose both, your encrypted data is permanently inaccessible.
recoveryKey.acknowledge: I have saved my recovery key in a secure place.

list.title: Secret Manager
list.subtitle: Zero-knowledge encrypted vaults for credentials and secrets.
list.emptyDescription: Create a vault to store encrypted secrets. Only vault members can decrypt them.

vaults.createDescription: A vault holds encrypted secrets shared only with its members. The server never sees plaintext values.
vaults.nameHint: A short, descriptive name visible to vault members.
vaults.createError: Failed to create vault. Please try again.
vaults.createMembershipUnconfirmed: The vault was created, but your access could not be confirmed. Reopen the vault to finish unlocking it.

detail.subtitle: Encrypted secrets — only vault members can decrypt values.
detail.notMember: You are not a member of this vault, so its secrets cannot be decrypted. Ask a current member to grant you access.
detail.membershipError: Could not verify your vault membership. Please refresh the page and try again.

items.empty: No secrets in this vault yet. Add the first one.
items.copyFailed: Copy failed — select and copy manually.
items.revealError: Decryption failed. The vault key may have changed.
items.notMember: You are not a member of this vault — its secrets cannot be revealed.
items.dekUnavailable: Session key unavailable. Please lock and unlock the Secret Manager.
items.dekUnavailableInline: The vault key could not be unwrapped. Lock and unlock the Secret Manager, then try saving again — your entry is preserved.
items.addDescription: The value is encrypted in your browser before being stored. The server never sees the plaintext.
items.handleHint: A unique machine identifier used in Knowledge Base chips (e.g. '{{ lazyit_secret.handle }}'). Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, dots, and hyphens only.
items.valueHint: Encrypted locally before storage. Never sent in plaintext.
items.createError: Failed to add secret. Please try again.
items.editDescription: Update the label or handle. To change the value, enter a new one — it will be re-encrypted before saving.
items.newValuePlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current value
items.newValueHint: If entered, re-encrypted locally before saving. The old ciphertext is replaced.
items.retypeNeedsValue: To change the type, re-enter the value below — it is re-encrypted so the type and the stored value stay in sync.
items.updateError: Failed to update secret. Please try again.
items.deleteDescription: Delete "{label}"? The ciphertext is soft-deleted and will no longer be accessible.
items.deleteError: Failed to delete secret. Please try again.

kindHints.GENERIC: A plain value — a password, API key, token, or any single string.
kindHints.SSH_KEY: An SSH private key (with an optional public key and passphrase).
kindHints.TOTP: A two-factor seed — lazyit shows the live 6-digit code when you reveal it.
kindHints.CERTIFICATE: An X.509 certificate (with an optional private key and chain).

typed.totpSecretHint: The base32 shared secret from the provider. Encrypted like any secret; lazyit derives the live code on your device.
typed.totpInvalid: Could not generate a code — check the seed format.

export.title: Export secrets
export.description: Download all {count} readable secrets in this vault as a .env file.
export.plaintextWarning: This downloads the secret values in PLAINTEXT to your device. Anyone with access to the downloaded file can read them. Store it securely and delete it when you're done.
export.successPartial: Exported {count} secrets ({failed} could not be decrypted and were skipped).
export.dekUnavailable: Vault key unavailable. Lock and unlock the Secret Manager, then try again.
export.error: Could not decrypt any secrets in this vault. The vault key may have changed.

import.title: Import secrets
import.description: Paste or upload a .env-style file to bulk-add secrets to "{vault}". Values are encrypted in your browser before being stored.
import.pastePlaceholder:
KEY=value
ANOTHER_KEY="a value"
# comments and blank lines are ignored
import.previewMalformed: {count} line(s) could not be parsed and will be ignored.
import.dekUnavailable: Vault key unavailable. Lock and unlock the Secret Manager, then try again.
import.error: Failed to import secrets. Please try again.

chip.lockedTooltip: You don't have access to this secret's vault.
chip.brokenTooltip: This secret reference is broken — no secret with this handle exists.
chip.copyFailed: Copy failed — select and copy manually.
chip.revealError: Couldn't decrypt this secret — it may be tampered with or your key is wrong.
chip.unlockDescription: Enter your password to reveal this secret inline.
chip.bootstrapDescription: You haven't set up your Secret Manager yet. Create a password to continue — your recovery key is shown only once.

members.singleMemberWarning: This vault has only one member. If you lose your password and recovery key, the vault will be permanently inaccessible — consider adding a second member.
members.revokeSemanticNote: Revoking a member prevents future decryption of vault secrets but does not invalidate any values they have already revealed. If a secret may be compromised, rotate the real credential.
members.addDescription: Select a user to grant access. The vault key will be securely wrapped to their public key in your browser.
members.noEligible: Everyone already has access to this vault.
members.usersLoadError: Failed to load users. Please refresh the page and try again.
members.targetNoKeypair: This user must set up their Secret Manager before you can grant them access.
members.noPublicKey: This user has not set up their Secret Manager yet. Ask them to open the Secret Manager first.
members.grantDekUnavailable: Session key unavailable. Please lock and unlock the Secret Manager.
members.granted: {name} has been granted access to this vault.
members.grantError: Failed to grant access. Please try again.
members.cannotRemoveLast: Cannot remove the last member of a vault. Add another member first.
members.revokeDescription: Remove {name} from this vault? They will no longer be able to decrypt vault secrets.
members.revokeError: Failed to revoke access. Please try again.

serviceAccountMembers.addDescription: Give a service account programmatic read access to this vault. The vault key is wrapped to the account's public key in your browser — the account can then retrieve secrets without a person.
serviceAccountMembers.grantHint: Only service accounts with the Fetch permission can retrieve secrets.
serviceAccountMembers.noKeypair: This service account has no encryption key yet. Rotate its token to enable programmatic access.
serviceAccountMembers.loadError: Failed to load service accounts. Please refresh the page and try again.
serviceAccountMembers.noEligible: No service accounts have the Fetch permission yet. Create one in Settings to enable programmatic access.
serviceAccountMembers.granted: {name} can now retrieve secrets from this vault.
serviceAccountMembers.grantError: Failed to grant access. Please try again.
serviceAccountMembers.alreadyMember: {name} already has access to this vault.
serviceAccountMembers.revoked: {name}'s access to this vault has been revoked.
serviceAccountMembers.revokeError: Failed to revoke access. Please try again.
serviceAccountMembers.notMember: {name} does not have access to this vault.
serviceAccountMembers.revokeDescription: Remove {name} from this vault? It will no longer be able to retrieve secrets programmatically.
